translations.it: La mia pronuncia è davvero brutta.
translations.vi: Phát âm của tôi thực sự rất tệ.
translations.hi: मेरा उच्चारण वाकई बहुत खराब है।
translations.el: Η προφορά μου είναι πραγματικά κακή.
translations.ro: Pronunția mea este cu adevărat proastă.
translations.ja: 私の発音は本当にひどいです。

tokens.explanation: possessive pronoun indicating first person; 'my'
the act or result of pronouncing; 'pronunciation'
subject particle marking the noun as subject
adverb expressing degree; 'too, very'
adverbial negator meaning 'not'
stative verb meaning 'to be good'; polite ending 요

translations.en: That friend’s pronunciation is really good.
translations.es: La pronunciación de ese amigo es realmente buena.
translations.fr: La prononciation de cet ami est vraiment bonne.
translations.de: Die Aussprache dieses Freundes ist wirklich gut.
translations.it: La pronuncia di quell'amico è davvero buona.
translations.zh-Hans: 那位朋友的发音真的很好。
translations.yue: 嗰位朋友嘅發音真係好好。
translations.pt: A pronúncia desse amigo é realmente boa.
translations.he: ההגייה של אותו חבר ממש טובה.
translations.tr: O arkadaşın telaffuzu gerçekten çok iyi.
translations.vi: Phát âm của người bạn đó thực sự rất tốt.
translations.nl: Die uitspraak van die vriend is echt goed.
translations.hu: Annak a barátnak a kiejtése valóban jó.
translations.hi: उस दोस्त का उच्चारण वाकई बहुत अच्छा है।
translations.pl: Wymowa tego przyjaciela jest naprawdę dobra.
translations.el: Η προφορά αυτού του φίλου είναι πραγματικά καλή.
translations.nb: Uttalen til den vennen er virkelig god.
translations.sv: Uttalet hos den vännen är verkligen bra.
translations.ro: Pronunția acelui prieten este cu adevărat bună.
translations.cs: Výslovnost toho přítele je opravdu dobrá.
translations.da: Udtalen hos den ven er virkelig god.
translations.fi: Tuon ystävän ääntäminen on todella hyvää.
translations.ja: あの友達の発音は本当に上手です。

tokens.explanation: demonstrative determiner meaning 'that'
a person with whom one has a friendly relationship
the act or result of pronouncing; 'pronunciation'
subject particle marking the noun as subject
adverb meaning 'really'
stative verb meaning 'to be good'; polite ending 요

translations.en: You need to practice pronunciation every day.
translations.es: Necesitas practicar la pronunciación todos los días.
translations.fr: Tu dois pratiquer la prononciation chaque jour.
translations.de: Du musst jeden Tag die Aussprache üben.
translations.it: Devi esercitarti nella pronuncia ogni giorno.
translations.ru: Тебе нужно каждый день практиковать произношение.
translations.pt: Você precisa praticar a pronúncia todos os dias.
translations.he: אתה צריך להתאמן בהגייה כל יום.
translations.tr: Her gün telaffuzun üzerinde pratik yapman gerek.
translations.vi: Bạn cần luyện phát âm mỗi ngày.
translations.nl: Je moet elke dag uitspraak oefenen.
translations.hu: Minden nap gyakorolnod kell a kiejtést.
translations.hi: तुम्हें हर दिन उच्चारण का अभ्यास करना चाहिए।
translations.el: Πρέπει να εξασκείς την προφορά κάθε μέρα.
translations.nb: Du må øve uttalen hver dag.
translations.id: Kamu perlu berlatih pelafalan setiap hari.
translations.sv: Du behöver öva uttal varje dag.
translations.ro: Trebuie să exersezi pronunția în fiecare zi.
translations.da: Du skal øve udtale hver dag.
translations.fi: Sinun täytyy harjoitella ääntämistä joka päivä.
translations.ja: 毎日発音の練習をする必要があります。

tokens.explanation: the act or result of pronouncing; 'pronunciation'
the act of practicing
object particle marking the noun as direct object
adverb meaning 'every day'
auxiliary indicating obligation; from '해야 하다'
polite form of '하다', used with auxiliary to express obligation

translations.en: I couldn’t understand because the pronunciation was different.
translations.es: No pude entender porque la pronunciación era diferente.
translations.fr: Je n’ai pas pu comprendre car la prononciation était différente.
translations.de: Ich konnte nicht verstehen, weil die Aussprache anders war.
translations.it: Non sono riuscito a capire perché la pronuncia era diversa.
translations.zh-Hans: 我没能听懂，因为发音不一样。
translations.yue: 我聽唔明，因為發音唔同。
translations.ru: Я не смог понять, потому что произношение было другим.
translations.pt: Eu não consegui entender porque a pronúncia era diferente.
translations.he: לא הצלחתי להבין כי ההגייה הייתה שונה.
translations.vi: Tôi không thể hiểu vì phát âm khác.
translations.ar: لم أستطع الفهم لأن النطق كان مختلفاً.
translations.nl: Ik kon het niet begrijpen omdat de uitspraak anders was.
translations.uk: Я не зміг зрозуміти, бо вимова була іншою.
translations.hu: Nem értettem meg, mert a kiejtés más volt.
translations.hi: मैं समझ नहीं पाया क्योंकि उच्चारण अलग था।
translations.pl: Nie mogłem zrozumieć, ponieważ wymowa była inna.
translations.el: Δεν μπόρεσα να καταλάβω επειδή η προφορά ήταν διαφορετική.
translations.nb: Jeg kunne ikke forstå fordi uttalen var annerledes.
translations.id: Saya tidak bisa mengerti karena pelafalannya berbeda.
translations.sv: Jag kunde inte förstå eftersom uttalet var annorlunda.
translations.ro: Nu am putut înțelege deoarece pronunția era diferită.
translations.cs: Nerozuměl jsem, protože výslovnost byla odlišná.
translations.da: Jeg kunne ikke forstå, fordi udtalen var forskellig.
translations.fi: En pystynyt ymmärtämään, koska ääntäminen oli erilainen.
translations.ja: 発音が違っていたので理解できませんでした。

tokens.explanation: the act or result of pronouncing; 'pronunciation'
subject particle marking the noun as subject
verb 'to be different' with connective '-서' indicating cause
adverbial negator indicating inability; 'cannot'
past tense polite of '알아듣다' meaning 'to understand'
